description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows pip build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single windows-2019 job that checks out the repository, sets up msbuild, installs Python 3.9, caches and installs Qt, installs Python dependencies including PyQt5 and numpy, builds the package with python setup.py build_ext --inplace, and runs tests with specific environment variables.
